productName: Const HRG EFCT 2:1:1 Yuzu Blackberry + Lemon Balm (50 CBN, 50mg CBD) 10 Pack (I)
description: Soft bright, zesty lemon gummies with a farmers-market fruit character, a glossy confectioner’s finish, and a cannabis infusion folded in as smoothly as a secret family recipe. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 2:1:1 ratio. Rich on flavor and easy to enjoy — start with a comfortable serving and let the edible do the rest.
